'''âsh-d-b-ch''' ('''kashadbechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aneal|aneal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aneal|aneal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-d-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kashadbechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadbechoko|thishadbechoko]] || [[word:jishadbechoko|jishadbechoko]] || [[word:shishadbechoko|shishadbechoko]] || [[word:kishadbechoko|kishadbechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadbechoko|thuthushadbechoko]] || [[word:jujushadbechoko|jujushadbechoko]] || [[word:shushushadbechoko|shushushadbechoko]] || [[word:kukushadbechoko|kukushadbechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadbechoko|thoshadbechoko]] || [[word:joshadbechoko|joshadbechoko]] || [[word:shoshadbechoko|shoshadbechoko]] || [[word:koshadbechoko|koshadbechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadbechoko|thashadbechoko]] || [[word:jashadbechoko|jashadbechoko]] || [[word:shashadbechoko|shashadbechoko]] || [[word:kashadbechoko|kashadbechoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
